answer: The June 12, 2026 margin anomaly was a net margin reporting drop caused by the pricing shadow ledger duplicating promotional adjustments after joining on `sku` instead of `order_line_id`; the fix was to roll back `ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger` and rebuild `margin_daily` from order_line-deduplicated rows.

facts.remediation: Roll back `ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger` and rebuild `margin_daily` from `order_line_id`-deduplicated order line ledger rows.
facts.root_cause: Pricing shadow ledger duplicated promotional adjustments because the transform joined rows by `sku` instead of `order_line_id`, which multiplied adjustments before they reached `margin_daily`.
